title: impatiens balsamina var. balsamina
intro: Impatiens balsamina var. balsamina, also known as the Garden Balsam or Balsam Impatiens, is a flowering plant species belonging to the balsam family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Impatiens balsamina var. balsamina include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
